selected_issues.proposed_change: Tune the hero copy toward a calmer safety-and-confidence frame in response to week 3's higher-volatility experiments.
Reduce CTA size variance so primary actions stay prominent without repeating the bounce-sensitive visual aggression from week 3.

reasoning: Week 3 taught the planner to favor conservative tuning, preserve copy clarity, and treat bounce sensitivity as a first-class design constraint.
monitor_signal: W3 exposed a bounce anomaly on visual changes, so the planner tuned more cautiously and looked for a dedicated bounce-risk critic.
